title: Greek Village Salad
instructions: Combine vegetables in a large bowl.

reviews.text: Perfect summer salad! Added a splash of red wine vinegar and a pinch of sea salt. Also added capers and fresh mint.
Added bell peppers and a drizzle of balsamic glaze. Used sheep's milk feta for extra creaminess.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
